rationale: Educ. Code §43.016 directs appropriation of available school funds for education but sets no minimum funding level or revenue guarantee. Reducing homestead tax revenue shrinks available funds but does not conflict with the appropriation directive.
quote: All available school funds shall be appropriated in each county for the education of its children.
_note: No direct statutory conflict; fiscal impact on school funding is indirect and addressed through separate school finance formulas.
